meaning: n.[鑽痌鐢叉皑铦跺懁,姘ㄧ敳铦跺懁,姘ㄧ敳鍙堕吀(鎶楄偪鐦よ嵂)
examples: Methotrexate and dactinomycin are chemotherapy drugs.
Methotrexate and misoprostol use is a two-step method.
Methotrexate is also used for treatment of an ectopic pregnancy.
As I understand it, methotrexate is also provisioned within standard treatments for rheumatoid arthritis.
Doctors have been told to make sure patients are given and understand information before they start methotrexate.
